title: Pennsylvania Disability Examiner Rates (INCOMPLETE — agent-inferred grades, OA schedule pending)
description: Pennsylvania DDS examiner/supervisor classifications (Disability Examiner I/II, Medical-Vocational Supervisor) on the PA Standard Compensation (SC) scale, with AGENT-INFERRED, UNVERIFIED pay grades (SC-09 / SC-10 / SC-11–12) and estimated min/max derived from job postings + BLS OEWS. status INCOMPLETE — estimates only: PA OA salary-schedule PDFs require login and the SEIU 668 contract appendix is not directly downloadable. Bargaining context confirmed: SEIU Local 668 Master Agreement 2023-2027.
